description: Replace outdated projects (Chronicle, Crypto Portfolio Analyzer, Fitness Tracking App) with accurate current projects: Crooked Finger, Elucidate Chess, GreenLine, and Ralph. Update src/data/projects.ts with rich metadata for each project.

userStories.title: Replace projects data with current projects
userStories.description: As a portfolio visitor, I want to see Chandler's real current projects so that I can evaluate his actual skills and work.
acceptanceCriteria: src/data/projects.ts exports exactly 4 projects: crooked-finger, elucidate-chess, greenline, ralph
Chronicle, crypto-portfolio-analyzer, and fitness-tracking-app entries are removed
Each project has: slug, title, shortDescription, description, image, tags, githubUrl, backgroundColor, overview, features[], techStack[], challenges[], outcomes[]
Elucidate Chess has no liveUrl (in progress)
GreenLine has no liveUrl (complete but not hosted)
Ralph has no liveUrl (it is a tool, not a SaaS)
Image paths use /projects/{slug}/hero.png format (files do not need to exist)
Each project has a distinct backgroundColor that fits its brand

userStories.title: Verify projects section renders correctly with new data
userStories.description: As a portfolio visitor, I want the projects section to display all 4 projects without errors so that the site is functional and professional.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build completes with no errors
No TypeScript errors in src/data/projects.ts or components/Projects.tsx
The Projects component still reads from the projects array and renders up to 3 items (projects.slice(0, 3))
All 4 project slugs are valid for dynamic routing at /projects/[slug]
getProjectBySlug and getAllProjectSlugs helper functions still work correctly
